saveframes.name: entry_information
tags: Chemical shifts of amorphous-looking aggregates of the P23T mutant of human gamma-D-crystallin formed at pH 7.

Partial chemical shift assignments of amorphous-looking aggregates 
of the P23T mutant of human gamma-D-crystallin formed at pH 7. 
Measurements performed by magic-angle-spinning solid-state NMR.

data: Solution NMR chemical shifts of cataract-causing P23T mutant of HgD crystallin in solution.
Solution NMR structure of cataract-causing P23T mutant of HgD crystallin in solution.
Crystal structure of cataract-causing P23T mutant of HgD crystallin obtained by X-ray crystallography.

saveframes.name: Citation_1
tags: Cataract-associated P23T gamma-D-crystallin retains a native-like fold in amorphous-looking aggregates formed at physiological pH

data: Aggregated state formed at neutral pH, with possibly correlations to cataract formation.
